tools.name: get_my_profile
tools.description: Return the calling user's Keycloak profile (claims from the validated JWT): subject, username, email, and realm roles. Use this to confirm the OAuth 3LO consent has propagated and the user identity is reaching the MCP server.

tools.name: echo
tools.description: Echo back a message together with the authenticated user's subject claim. Useful to confirm that auth context is present without exposing all claims.
